entities.name: UGANDA
entities.description: The country where the study on agricultural policy development is conducted

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL POLICY DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of creating and implementing policies related to agriculture

entities.name: DEMOCRATIC DEFICIT
entities.description: A lack of democratic processes or representation in the political context

entities.name: PATRONAGE
entities.description: The use of authority for or by a patron, often involving favoritism in political contexts

entities.name: PUBLIC PARTICIPATION
entities.description: The involvement of the general public in the policymaking process

entities.name: QUALITATIVE DATA COLLECTION
entities.description: The approach used to gather non-numerical information for analysis

entities.name: IN-DEPTH INTERVIEWS
entities.description: A qualitative research technique involving detailed one-on-one conversations

entities.name: FOCUS GROUP DISCUSSIONS
entities.description: A qualitative research technique involving group interactions to gather diverse perspectives

entities.name: RECORDED OBSERVATIONS
entities.description: A method of gathering data by documenting behaviors and events in stakeholder consultations

entities.name: STAKEHOLDER CONSULTATIONS
entities.description: Meetings held to gather input from interested parties

entities.name: POWER IMBALANCES
entities.description: The unequal distribution of power among stakeholders influencing policy

entities.name: GOOD GOVERNANCE
entities.description: The process of decision-making and the process by which decisions are implemented in a fair and transparent manner

entities.name: CO-DESIGN
entities.description: An approach to policy development involving collaborative design between stakeholders

entities.name: CO-OWNERSHIP
entities.description: A state where stakeholders feel a shared responsibility and ownership of the resulting policies

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL DONORS
entities.description: External funding bodies that influence policy decisions due to financial resources
